content:
🚀 dock-droid | Dockerfile
🎯 Primary Use Case: Running and testing Android environments within Docker containers for development, security research, and CI/CD pipelines.
✨ Key Features: • Run QEMU Android x86 and ARM in Docker • X11 Forwarding • ADB on port :5555 • Magisk, riru, LSPosed support on Android x86 • SSH enabled
📖 Summary: Dock-Droid allows users to run Android x86 and ARM environments within Docker containers using QEMU and KVM. It facilitates advanced use cases like security research, CI/CD pipelines, and app testing with features like X11 forwarding, ADB access, and GPU passthrough.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
